title: LLM JSON Output Tolerance
summary: Use json.Decoder.Decode instead of json.Unmarshal to tolerate trailing content in LLM responses; add stripJSONCodeFence helper for markdown-wrapped output.
body: LLM responses often contain trailing content (markdown fences, notes after JSON). Parsing with `json.Unmarshal` fails hard; switching to `json.Decoder.Decode` allows trailing content. Add a `stripJSONCodeFence` helper to handle markdown-wrapped responses. Combine with `dec.More()` logging to catch truncation. The fix converted a 100%-failure rate on detailed resumes to 0 failures once the upstream token cap was corrected. Implemented in PR #219.
